site.name: Smart Inclusive
site.tagline: An inclusive education platform for every child

footer.description: Smart Inclusive is an open inclusive education platform for children, parents and volunteers. No sign-up required.

a11y.screenReaderInfo: Screen Reader compatibility is enabled. You can fully navigate the website using the keyboard (Tab, Enter).

list.emptyDesc: New learning materials will be added to this section soon.
list.filteredEmptyDesc: No content matches the selected filters. Try different filters or clear them.

test.exitDesc: Do you really want to quit the test? Your current progress will not be saved.
test.passedDesc: You answered {correct} of {total} questions correctly. Overall score: {score}%
test.failedTitle: Not quite the result you hoped for
test.failedDesc: Unfortunately you didn't pass. Passing score: 60%. Your score: {score}% ({correct}/{total} correct). Don't worry, give it another try!
test.vocabExitDesc: Do you really want to finish the test? Your current result will not be saved.
test.vocabPassedTitle: Great! You passed the vocabulary test!
test.vocabPassedDesc: You correctly found {correct} words from the “{topic}” topic! Overall score: {score}%
test.vocabFailedTitle: Not quite the result you hoped for
test.vocabFailedDesc: Your score: {score}% ({correct}/{total} correct). Don't worry, review the words and try again!
test.vocabPrompt: Find the picture that matches this word:

reader.testPrompt: To test your knowledge of this book, start the quiz below.

player.unsupported: Your browser does not support the player.

home.slide1Desc: Interactive games, engaging lessons and e-books for children.
home.slide2Title: I can do it all myself!
home.slide2Desc: A portal for unlocking children's creativity and exploring the world through art.
home.slide3Desc: Home-schooling methods, legal support and an active volunteer community.
home.videosDesc: Real-life stories of children and volunteers achieving success with the Smart Inclusive platform.
home.navDesc: Quick access to all interactive sections of the platform. Pick a section and start learning!
home.navDictionaryDesc: A fun dictionary with pictures and sign language.
home.navParentsDesc: Advice, legal help and home-schooling guides.
home.navContactDesc: A form for suggestions and contacting the project team.
home.ctaDesc: Join our inclusive family. Help children master their lessons, share joy with them and make a big contribution to the future. No registration required to help!
home.story1Desc: 8-year-old Akmal from Tashkent learned to recognise letters on his own thanks to Smart Inclusive lessons.
home.story2Desc: How did the inclusive education platform make Madina's home learning easier?
home.story3Desc: A video story about how volunteers from Fergana help children master their lessons.

sections.etiquetteSubtitle: Fun comics about politeness and good manners. After reading, try the situational tests.
sections.etiquetteTestsSubtitle: Learn how to behave in different real-life situations.
sections.iCanTitle: I can do it all myself!
sections.iCanSubtitle: Short videos that teach everyday skills to do on your own.
sections.lessonsSubtitle: A collection of fun video lessons introducing colours, counting and letters.
sections.booksSubtitle: Read fairy tales and stories with pictures and audio. Each book can be listened to in any language.
sections.testsSubtitle: Fun tests on various topics. Confetti awaits every correct answer!
sections.iCanEyebrow: I can do it all myself!
sections.parentsVideosSubtitle: A collection of developmental sensory and pedagogical guidance prepared by specialists.
sections.parentsTestsSubtitle: Tests to reinforce your knowledge about child development and inclusive skills.
sections.legalSubtitle: Laws, benefits and guarantees for educating children with special needs in state and public institutions.
sections.articlesSubtitle: Advice on using the system correctly, tracking children's progress and collaborating with volunteers.
sections.homeEdSubtitle: Interactive lessons and motor-skill activities you can do with your child at home.
sections.parentsHubSubtitle: Explore lessons, legal articles and learning guides that support your child's development.
sections.hubTestsDesc: Test your knowledge of inclusive education
sections.hubVideosDesc: Useful advice and video lessons from specialists
sections.hubLegalDesc: Your child's rights and guarantees to education
sections.hubArticlesDesc: Tips for using the system conveniently and correctly
sections.hubOnboardingDesc: A guide to creating a comfortable environment for your child
sections.hubPresentationDesc: The idea and goals of the Smart Inclusive project
sections.hubHomeEdDesc: Lessons you can do with your child at home

vocab.title: Dictionary topics
vocab.subtitle: Learn new words with fun pictures and audio pronunciation. Pick any topic and get started!
vocab.emptyLang: No topics have been added in this language yet.
vocab.cardDesc: This set lets you learn new words with picture cards and audio pronunciation.

slides.completionDesc: You've viewed all the slides in this section. Use the buttons below to view the presentation again or return to the lessons.

slidePages.aboutCompletionTitle: Thank you for getting to know the Smart Inclusive project!
slidePages.aboutCompletionDesc: Our goal is to make education equally inclusive for every child. Join us — become a volunteer or help spread the word about the project.

contact.title: Contact form
contact.subtitle: If you have questions or suggestions, fill in the form below.
contact.successDesc: Thank you for writing to us. Our team will review your message and get in touch with you soon.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Write your question or suggestion here in detail...

volunteer.title: Become a volunteer
volunteer.subtitle: Let's bring joy and knowledge into the lives of children with special needs together!
volunteer.successDesc: Thank you for your interest in joining our volunteers. Our team will review your application and contact you soon.
volunteer.reasonLabel: Why do you want to volunteer?
volunteer.reasonPlaceholder: Briefly describe your goal for taking part in the project...

aboutUsPage.testimonialsSubtitle: Feedback from parents whose children learn through the platform and from our volunteers.
aboutUsPage.travelsSubtitle: A gallery of our trips to spread inclusion in schools across regions and remote districts.
aboutUsPage.videosSubtitle: Short interactive reports and lessons from our activities in the regions.

volunteersPage.activitiesTitle: What will you do with us?
volunteersPage.activitiesSubtitle: Every volunteer can help in an area that matches their abilities and interests.
volunteersPage.casesSubtitle: Lessons and events carried out together, and changes in families' lives.
volunteersPage.formSubtitle: Join us and contribute to the development of our children!
volunteersPage.extraPlaceholder: Write a few words about yourself or your experience...
volunteersPage.successDesc: Thank you for your interest in our team. Your application will be reviewed and our coordinators will contact you soon!
